历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 13300 → 13295 → 17557 → 17139 → 16516. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (expanding by about 4262 places compared to 2022). In 2024–2025, it rebounded for two consecutive years, with a baseline of about 16516 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 555 in 2021, 535 in 2022, 528 in 2023, 520 in 2024, and 525 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 569, an increase of 44 students (+8.4%) compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, theoretically leading to slightly increased competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it was approximately 53rd in 2026, up 3 places from 2025 (56th), with a steady upward trend in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive (positive events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate). Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, with average reviews. No records of admission cutoff drops. Education is A+, Political Science A-, Psychology A-, Chinese History A-, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding strength in normal (teacher-training) disciplines, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other Physics-related majors continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 393,700, a slight increase from 2025 (about 391,200), leading to slightly intensified competition. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, a provincial ministry-affiliated 211 normal university. Its provincial enrollment proportion has historically been high. In 2025, the Physics Category plan of 525 students accounted for about 66% of the university's total plan in Hubei, indicating stable willingness of local candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 16516, the approximately 8.4% expansion in 2026 which increases the ranking number, the rise in Soft Science ranking and positive reputation slightly increasing competition heat, and the small increase in the total number of provincial examinees, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 17317, with a range of 16817–17817.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 16817–17817, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Mathematics, etc., popular engineering fields) as the main direction, Tier 1 national public-funded normal student majors as a sprint (ranking needs to be significantly better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 economics, management, and law majors as a safety net. Public-funded normal student majors are highly competitive but offer strong employment security, making them worth serious consideration for high-scoring candidates.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2776 → 2577 → 3124 → 3161 → 3166. Rankings were higher in 2021–2022, but shifted significantly downward from 2023, stabilizing around 3100–3170 in recent three years. The 2025 baseline is about 3166. In-province History Category enrollment plans: 271 in 2021, 286 in 2022, 290 in 2023, 282 in 2024, 266 in 2025; 2026 plan is 258, a reduction of 8 students (-3.0%) compared to 2025, a relatively small reduction, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 53rd in 2026, up 3 places from 2025 (56th), with stable improvement in recent years. 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive (positive events such as 81-year-old doctoral graduate). Douyin popularity ranking 89th, average evaluation; no record of enrollment gaps. Education A+, Political Science A-, Psychology A-, Chinese History A-, Marxist Theory A-, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines, strongly attracting History Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Teacher-training/education major popularity is polarized and wait-and-see; Chinese Language/Literature major recommended; Law major polarized and wait-and-see. In 2026, total number of examinees in the province is approximately 393,700, slightly increased from 2025 (about 391,200), leading to slightly intensified competition. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei Province, a provincial ministry-affiliated 211 teacher-training institution with a historically high proportion of in-province enrollment. In 2025, History Category plan of 266 students accounts for about 34% of the university's total plan in Hubei, and in-province applicants' willingness to apply is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 3166, a 2026 enrollment reduction of about 3% leading to a slight decrease in ranking number, a rise in Soft Science ranking and positive reputation slightly increasing competition heat, and a slight increase in total number of in-province examinees, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 3139, with a range of 2639–3639.
